limitation: Installed vLLM does not expose an arbitrary verifier block-mask path; patching site-packages was not performed from the shared sandbox.

notes: vllm.v1.attention.backends.flash_attn is the live Qwen3-8B path; it forwards paged KV block_table/seqused_k into flash_attn_varlen_func, but has no request-time arbitrary verifier block-mask field.
vllm.v1.attention.backends.flex_attention contains mask-like identifiers; these are backend/local masks, not a PAMS verifier-mask API.
No installed vLLM feature flag for PAMS was found. Arbitrary verifier block masks are treated as unsupported until a local vLLM source patch is applied.
